metadata.description: IS-U / S/4 Utilities comprehensive catalog for AI-assisted SAP development. Contains BAPIs, function modules, classes, reports, CDS views, tables with field types, transactions, and customizing.

function_modules_from_sap.ISU_*: 9999+ (exceeded limit - use specific patterns ISU_A*, ISU_B*, etc.)
function_modules_from_sap.FKK*: 9999+ (exceeded limit - use specific patterns FKK_A*, FKK_B*, etc.)

metadata.how_to_update: 1. Run SE16N with TFDIR table for function modules (search on FUNCNAME). 2. Run SE16N with SEOCLASS for classes (search on CLSNAME). 3. For table field details: SE11 or SE16N on DD03VV/DD04T. 4. For transactions: SE93. 5. Update version and last_updated.

/IDXGC/.name: Market Process Management (Common Layer)
/IDXGC/.description: Unified technical basis for market processes in deregulated energy markets. Controls PDOC (Process Documents) and data containers.

/IDXGL/.name: German Locale
/IDXGL/.description: Germany-specific implementations for electricity and gas markets. Contains German EDIFACT message formats, IDoc structures, and business rules for GPKE, MaBiS, GeLi Gas, WiM.
/IDXGL/.system_requirements: S/4HANA Utilities with German market add-ons

/APE/.name: Application Process Engine
/APE/.description: Modern framework for market processes in S/4HANA 2208+. Uses RESTful ABAP Programming Model with OData HTTP REST APIs and Fiori UI.

concepts.TDOC: Transfer Document - tracks market message transfers
concepts.PDOC: Process Document - tracks market process execution

/APEU/.name: APE Utilities Extension
/APEU/.description: Extension for Measurement Concept Management (MCM) and Cloud integration

/UCOM/.name: Utilities Common Layer
/UCOM/.description: Common components connecting S/4HANA Utilities with MaCo Cloud

/US4G/.name: Utilities Solution Germany
/US4G/.description: Successor to IDEX for German regulatory requirements. Replaces /ID* namespace in S/4HANA.

/IDXPF/.name: Exchange Framework (Legacy)
/IDXPF/.full_name: Process and Data-Exchange Framework for Utilities
/IDXPF/.description: Original IDEX solution for SAP ECC. Predecessor of /IDXGC/.

EAMI_.name: Advanced Metering Infrastructure
EAMI_.description: Support for smart meters with remote capabilities

ISU_EDM_.name: Energy Data Management
ISU_EDM_.description: Management, settlement and billing of equidistant time series data (load profiles)

EANL.description: Installation master data - central link between technical and commercial

EUIINSTLN.description: Allocation of Installation to Point of Delivery
EUIINSTLN.note: INT_UI is internal key; use EUITRANS to get external POD number (EXT_UI)

EABL.description: Meter Reading Document (MR orders and results)

EABLG.description: Meter Reading Reasons in MR Document

EGERH.description: Historical Data of IS-U Device Master Record

EQUI.description: Equipment Master Data (PM module, shared with IS-U)

TE221.note: BW Relevant flag must be set for BW extraction

TE835.note: Allocated via EA88 to variant programs

TFK012A.description: Payment Method to Bank Transaction Allocation

TFK020K.description: Short Account Assignments for Transfer Postings

versorgungsszenarien._hinweis: Für Versorgungsszenario-Aufbau müssen mehrere Tabellen gepflegt werden

/US4G/SETTL_MALO.beschreibung: Bilanzierungsdaten für MaLo - jeder Zählpunkt muss hier gepflegt werden

/US4G/SETTL_DATE.beschreibung: Zuordnung der Abrechnungseinheit - jeder Zählpunkt muss hier gepflegt werden
/US4G/SETTL_DATE.hinweis: Sollte im Lieferbeginn automatisch angelegt werden

/US4G/WIM_SUSC.beschreibung: Bestimmung des Zielversorgerszenarios für den WiM-Prozess

EEDMSUNITCAT.hinweis: Eintrag 05 (Fremdbelieferte ZP im eigenen Netz): USESUPPLIER von 04 auf 01 ändern für Lieferbeginn-Reiter Bilanzierung

EEDMUISETTLUNIT.beschreibung: UI Settlement Unit - Einträge werden automatisch im Lieferbeginn angelegt

V_TE001.description: Zuordnung Buchungskreis - Sparte (Company Code to Division)

V_TE014_COMP_IND.description: Komponenten für LPC, PPI, Zinsen (Interest components)

installation.name: Installation / Anlage
installation.description: IS-U installations - connection between contract and POD

premise.name: Premise / Verbrauchsstelle
premise.description: Physical location where energy is consumed

connection_object.name: Connection Object / Anschlussobjekt
connection_object.description: Physical connection point to the grid

point_of_delivery.name: Point of Delivery (POD)
point_of_delivery.description: Regulatory delivery point identification (MaLo/MeLo in Germany)

contract_account.name: Contract Account / Vertragskonto
contract_account.description: FI-CA contract accounts for billing and receivables

fica_document.name: FI-CA Documents
fica_document.description: Contract accounting documents, postings, and clearing
fica_document.note: FKK_* function modules are not officially released - use BAPI_CTRAC* instead

market_communication.name: Market Communication / Marktkommunikation
market_communication.description: IDEX, MPM, APE - market process management for deregulated energy markets

smart_metering.name: Smart Metering / AMI
smart_metering.description: Advanced Metering Infrastructure for smart meters

energy_data_management.name: Energy Data Management (EDM)
energy_data_management.description: Management of equidistant time series data (load profiles)

bapis.description: Create equipment using reference as template

bapis.name: BAPI_ISUPARTNER_GETLIST
bapis.description: Get list of business partners by search criteria

bapis.name: BAPI_CTRACCONTRACTACCOUNT_GBAL
bapis.description: Get account balance at key date

function_modules.description: Read installation structure with device info

function_modules.description: Set equipment data in global buffer

function_modules.name: ISU_O_METERREAD_ACTION
function_modules.description: Main function for meter reading actions

function_modules.name: ISU_MR_ORDER_FILL
function_modules.description: Read print and download data of meter reading docs

function_modules.name: ISU_DETERM_MRSTAT_BILLPERIOD
function_modules.description: Determine meter reading status for billing period

function_modules.name: FKK_CREATE_DOC_AND_CLEAR
function_modules.description: Post single document with clearing (not SAP released)

function_modules.name: FKK_CREATE_DOC_MASS_AND_CLEAR
function_modules.description: Mass posting with clearing (not SAP released)

function_modules.name: FKK_FUNC_MODULE_DETERMINE
function_modules.description: Determine function module for FI-CA event

important_classes.name: CL_FKK_EXTERNAL_CASH_DESK
important_classes.description: External cash desk for offline branches

important_classes.name: CL_MD_BP_MAINTAIN
important_classes.description: API class for BP maintenance (S/4HANA recommended)

/IDXGL/PRICAT_H_MIG_CORR.description: Generate GUID IDs for outbound (SAP Note 2859288)

/IDXGL/PRISHEET_H_MIG_CORR.description: Generate GUID IDs for inbound (SAP Note 3416238)

cds_views.note: Specific CDS view names are not publicly documented by SAP. Use SE11/SE16N with DDLSRC table or Eclipse ADT to discover CDS views in your system.

important_notes.bapi_commit: Always call BAPI_TRANSACTION_COMMIT after successful BAPI calls that modify data
important_notes.unreleased_fms: Avoid using non-released function modules (like FKK_ACCOUNT_UPDATE) - SAP may change them without notice
important_notes.remote_enabled: Not all ISU_S_* function modules are remote-enabled (RFC). They may require an RFC wrapper.
important_notes.master_data_templates: For complex device creation, use Master Data Templates (MDT) via EPRODCUST and ISU_PRODUCT_IMPLEMENT
important_notes.s4hana_migration: Namespaces /ID* do not exist in S/4HANA - use /US4G/ instead

_extraktionsinfo.hinweis: Nur im System vorhandene Transaktionen sind aufgeführt

_extraction_info.note: ABAP-Datentypen: CLNT=Mandant, CHAR=Zeichenkette, NUMC=Numerisch, DATS=Datum, TIMS=Zeit, DEC=Dezimal, CURR=Währung, CUKY=Währungsschlüssel, LANG=Sprache
